title: metalepis peraffinis
intro: Metalepis peraffinis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the 'Peruvian ginger'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metalepis peraffinis include relief from pain and swelling, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce nausea. Metalepis peraffinis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health issues.
